modules.name: Data Collection & Ingestion
modules.description: Responsible for gathering text data from social media sources. This can involve connecting to live APIs (if accessible) or ingesting pre-collected CSV/JSON datasets.

modules.name: Text Preprocessing Pipeline
modules.description: Cleans the raw text data to prepare it for machine learning models. This involves removing URLs, special characters, and stop-words, handling emojis, and performing tokenization and lemmatization.

modules.name: Sentiment Classification Model
modules.description: The core AI module that takes the preprocessed text and outputs a sentiment label (Positive, Negative, Neutral) along with a confidence score.

modules.name: Trend Analysis & Aggregation
modules.description: Groups the classified data by time intervals (e.g., hourly, daily) or topics/keywords to calculate overall sentiment trends and volume.

modules.name: Interactive Dashboard
modules.description: Provides the user interface for monitoring the sentiment trends. It reads the aggregated data and renders charts, metrics, and data tables for end-users.
